message.content:
@startuml
participant "Client" as Client1
participant "RMB" as RMB
participant "Node" as Node

Client1 ..> RMB : Create an RMB message
    cmd: zos.deployment.deploy, dat: base64(json(deployment))

RMB ..> Node : Decode payload(dat).
    So node receive a deployment object

Node ..> RMB : Accepted Or Error

RMB ..> Client1 : Response from the node

Node ..> Node : If valid
    Deploy

RMB ..> Node : Get Deployment (cmd: zos.deployment.get)

Node ..> RMB : Call get method

RMB ..> Node : Get Response

Node ..> Client1 : Response

@enduml
